home.title: Build together.
home.subtitle: Reward participation, fund initiatives, and govern transparently.
home.intro: SHUI is a Solana-native community token designed to reward contributors, finance projects via a shared treasury, and operate with clear rules and public accountability.
home.liveHolderMapPowered: Live holder map powered by Bubblemaps (Top 80).
home.dataRefreshNote: Data updates depend on Bubblemaps refresh cadence.
home.tokenSectionIntro: SHUI rewards meaningful participation, supports initiatives via a community treasury, and aims for professional-grade transparency.
home.tokenCard1Text: Incentives for builders, contributors, and community actions.
home.tokenCard2Text: Funding proposals with traceable decisions and spending.
home.tokenCard3Text: Clear rules, processes, and public documentation.
home.communitySectionIntro: Community section (info). For the members area, use /community.
home.noTxNoticeV1: No transaction is requested to access members (V1).

community.toolsIntro: Here you will find SHUI community tools.
community.swapTxNormal: ⚠️ Swap: if you swap, Jupiter will ask you to sign a transaction (normal).
community.integratedSwapText: Swap directly here (pre-set SOL → SHUI). No swap is executed without your action.
community.securityUltra: ULTRA security: signMessage + nonce + anti-replay server session.

coach.dashboardNeedWalletText:
To access the dashboard:
1) Connect your wallet (top button).
2) Enable secure login (V2): you sign a message (not a transaction).
3) Then click Dashboard.
coach.dashboardNeedSessionText:
The dashboard is reserved for members with Session OK.
Enable secure login (V2) first:
→ you sign a readable message (free), NOT a transaction.

dashboard.title: Members Area
dashboard.intro: You are connected via V2 ULTRA: readable message signature + nonce + server session (httpOnly cookie).
dashboard.beginnerDashboardHint:
You are already “connected” here (Session OK).
The session comes from a message signature (no transaction).
If the session expires: go back to /community and enable secure login again.
dashboard.security3: ✅ Session: httpOnly cookie (not readable by JS).
dashboard.security4: ⚠️ Swap = transaction (normal). You always see the transaction in Phantom.
dashboard.questsHint:
Quests reward activity.
Follow the steps, then validate.
Some quests may require an on-chain action later (swap/hold), but not the login.
dashboard.rewardsHint:
Here you see your rewards / status.
CSV export or “admin” actions may exist: they are reserved to allowlisted wallets.
If you’re not admin, you can only view.
dashboard.identityNote: This wallet proved ownership via message signature. No private key is shared.
dashboard.help1: • If “Session OK” disappears: go back to /community and reconnect V2.
dashboard.help2: • If Phantom shows a transaction for login: STOP.
dashboard.help3: • Swaps require a transaction: that’s normal.

toggle.title: Enable/disable simplified help (Beginner Mode).
toggle.label: Beginner Mode:
toggle.quickText: I guide you step by step (wallet, buying SHUI, swap, pool) with simple words.

coach.label: Beginner Coach
coach.tip: Tip: click “?” on an area to see the explanation here.

progress.title: Beginner path
progress.subtitle: 4 simple steps • goal: avoid mistakes

step1.title: 1) Install Phantom
step1.subtitle: Browser extension. Store your seed offline.
step1.coachText:
Never share your seed phrase.
Avoid unknown links.
When ready: connect the wallet on the site (step 2).

step2.title: 2) Connect the wallet
step2.subtitle: Click the wallet button (top). Wallet connect ≠ transaction.

step3.title: 3) Enable secure login (V2)
step3.subtitle: Sign a message (free) → Session OK → access Dashboard.
step3.coachText:
You sign a readable message (free).
No transaction.
If Phantom shows a transaction here: STOP.

step4.title: 4) First test (small amount)
step4.subtitle: Swap SOL→SHUI or LP: normal transaction. Start small.

progress.reminder: Reminder: login = signed message • swap/LP = transaction.

step1.title: Next step: connect the wallet
step1.body:
Click the wallet button on the top right (Phantom / Solflare).
Wallet connect ≠ secure login: here you only reveal your address.
No transaction is required to connect to the site.

step2.title: Next step: enable secure login (V2)
step2.body:
Your wallet is connected. Now enable V2.
You will sign a readable message (signMessage) — NOT a transaction.
If Phantom shows a transaction here: STOP.
step2.coachText:
Goal: create a server session.
You sign a readable message (free) — no transaction.
Then: “Session OK” appears, and /dashboard becomes accessible.

step3.title: Next step: go to the dashboard
step3.body:
Session OK ✅
The dashboard contains Quests / Rewards.
You can track your points and monthly status.

step4.title: Next step: complete a quest
step4.body:
Pick an easy quest to start.
V1: off-chain claim (no transaction).
Later: some proofs may be on-chain (swap/hold), but not the login.

guide.glossaryNote: (The full glossary will expand later — this is the “useful right now” version.)
guide.tip1: Tip: this guide explains “what to do” + “what to sign”. Swaps/LP will always require a transaction (normal).

safety.title: Before you start (security)
safety.b1: A wallet is your vault. NEVER share your secret phrase (seed).
safety.b2: Site login = message signature (not a transaction).
safety.b3: Swap / Buy / Sell = transaction (normal: Phantom will show it).
safety.b4: If a pop-up asks for a transaction when you only wanted to log in: STOP.
safety.warning: Golden rule: no legitimate site will ever ask for your seed phrase.

wallet.title: Create a wallet (Phantom)
wallet.b3: Store the secret phrase offline (paper / safe).
wallet.b4: Enable a PIN / biometrics on your device.
wallet.warning: Lose your seed = lose access to your funds. Nobody can recover it for you.

secureLogin.title: Enable secure login (V2)
secureLogin.b2: You sign a readable message (NOT a transaction).
secureLogin.b3: The site creates a server session (httpOnly cookie).
secureLogin.warning: If Phantom shows a transaction here: it’s abnormal → do not accept.

buy.title: Buy / Swap SHUI (beginner)
buy.b1: The integrated swap (Jupiter) lets you exchange SOL → SHUI.
buy.b2: A swap = transaction: Phantom will ask you to sign.
buy.b4: Always verify the token (mint) before confirming.

lp.title: Understand liquidity (LP)
lp.b1: LP means you deposit 2 tokens (e.g., SOL + SHUI) into a pool.
lp.b2: You receive an LP token representing your share.
lp.b4: Know about impermanent loss (it can move).
lp.warning: LP is not “guaranteed”. Do it only if you understand the concept.

dashboard.title: Dashboard & Quests (rewards)
dashboard.b1: Quests give off-chain points (to reward activity).

next.title: What comes next (public vision)
next.b1: Later: simpler swaps (SOL/SHUI, USDC/SHUI, etc.) with more liquid pools.
next.b2: We will add a more guided beginner path (steps + images + mini-coach).
next.b3: Goal: make SHUI usable for newcomers too.

wallet.v: App that holds your keys and lets you sign.

seed.v: Secret recovery phrase. Never share it.

lp.v: Reserve of 2 tokens used for swaps. Adding LP means depositing both.

tx.v: On-chain action you sign (send, swap, LP, etc.).

quests.panelSubtitle: Off-chain points (no transaction). On-chain bonus (holder/LP): weighted + capped.
quests.securityNote: Security: endpoints protected by session + allowlist “quest-claim” + rate-limit.

telegram.help: Steps: open the Telegram bot → press Start → come back here and click Verify.

x.shareHelp: Steps: connect X if needed → share today’s post → come back here and click Verify.
x.mustShareFirst: Click “Share on X” first before verifying.

instagram.help: Steps: open Instagram → follow @shui.officialtoken → come back here and click Verify.

secureLogin.noSignMessage: Your wallet doesn’t support signMessage here. Try Phantom (browser extension) and reconnect.
secureLogin.title: Secure login (V2)
secureLogin.desc: Readable message signature → server session (httpOnly cookie).

meta.title: Explore SHUI — Community Infrastructure on Solana
meta.description: Discover SHUI, a community-driven Web3 infrastructure on Solana. Tokenomics, wallets, contribution levels, missions, and economic loop.
meta.ogTitle: Explore SHUI — Web3 Infrastructure on Solana
meta.ogDescription: We are drops. Together, we form an ocean.

hero.subtitle: Web3 on Solana. Participation. Transparency. Collective growth.
hero.quote: We are drops. Together, we form an ocean.

why.subtitle: SHUI was born from a simple observation: the crypto market deserves better than pure speculation.

cards.title: Pure speculation
cards.desc: Most crypto projects have no real utility. Just volatility.

cards.title: Opaque funds
cards.desc: Where do the funds go? Who decides? Holders have no visibility.

cards.title: Passive community
cards.desc: Holding a token is not enough. Real contribution is almost never rewarded.

cards.title: The SHUI answer
cards.desc: A circular economy where every participant creates and receives real value.

foundations.subtitle: The SHUI philosophy is built on four core values that guide every decision.

items.label: Participation
items.desc: Every member contributes actively, regardless of skill level.

items.label: Transparency
items.desc: All wallets are public. Every movement is auditable on Solscan.

items.label: Contribution
items.desc: Real actions are rewarded. Concrete missions, not empty promises.

items.label: Treasury
items.desc: A community treasury funds projects voted on by SHUI holders.

tokenomics.subtitle: Fixed, non-inflationary supply. Every wallet has a precise role and a public verifiable address.

items.label: Community Rewards
items.role: Reward active contributions through missions and quests. Progressive vesting over 6–12 months.

items.label: Liquidity Pool
items.role: Provide liquidity on Raydium and Jupiter for smooth trading.

items.label: Treasury / DAO
items.role: Fund projects and initiatives approved by the community.

items.label: Team / Ops
items.role: Cover operating costs and the ongoing development of SHUI Labs.

items.label: Partnerships
items.role: Support strategic partnerships and ecosystem expansion.

wallets.subtitle: Each wallet is separated, public, and auditable on Solscan. Full transparency by design.

items.label: Liquidity Pool
items.desc: Liquidity on Raydium & Jupiter. Smooth trading ensured.

items.label: Community Rewards
items.desc: Progressive reward distribution for active contributors.

items.label: Treasury / DAO
items.desc: Community treasury — funding decided by holders.

levels.subtitle: Every contribution lifts you higher. The more you give to the community, the greater your impact becomes.

items.name: Flow
items.role: Active participant — sharing and contributing regularly

missions.subtitle: Concrete missions to contribute to the SHUI ecosystem and earn SHUI rewards.

items.title: Build a Tool
items.desc: Create a tool for the ecosystem

loop.subtitle: Unlike linear speculation, SHUI moves in cycles. Every action feeds the next one.

roadmap.subtitle: A methodical progression toward a mature and decentralized ecosystem.

transparency.subtitle: Trust is built through transparency. Everything is verifiable, public, and available in real time.

items.label: Public token
items.desc: Mint Authority disabled. Auditable on Solscan.

items.label: 5 separate wallets
items.desc: Each wallet = 1 unique role. No mixed funds.

items.label: DAO governance
items.desc: Holders vote on key decisions via the Treasury.

items.label: BubbleMaps
items.desc: Holder distribution visualized in real time.

items.label: Decentralized
items.desc: Code and decisions shared openly with the community.

cta.subtitle: SHUI is a community project. Its strength comes from its members. Every participation, every contribution, every share strengthens the ecosystem.
cta.disclaimer: Informational document only. Do your own research (DYOR). Crypto assets involve a risk of capital loss.

actions.label: Join Telegram
actions.desc: The community is waiting for you
